academic_requirements.summary: Applicants need a bachelor's degree or equivalent and must satisfy the programme's curricular background requirements together with any country-based entry-title and GPA rules.
academic_requirements.prior_degree_or_diploma: Bachelor diploma (or equivalent); a minimum three-year undergraduate degree (or equivalent) is required.
academic_requirements.subject_requirements: Applicants must show proven skills in Biology, Biochemistry, Statistic, Chemistry, Biotechnology for the production of goods and services, and ethical regulations and issues.
academic_requirements.gpa_or_country_requirements: Country-based specific entry title and GPA requirements apply; check the official University page for the applicant's country.

accepted_proofs: A recognised English certificate meeting the University minimum scores, such as TOEFL iBT 80, IELTS 6.0, Cambridge B2 First 173, or PTE Academic 65.
A previous qualification completed entirely in English, documented through self-certification or an official statement showing the language of instruction.
A provisional statement of results from the certifying body is accepted while waiting for the final certificate.
exemption_rules: Applicants whose bachelor's degree or equivalent entry qualification was completed entirely in English are exempt from submitting a separate English certificate.
Native English speakers from recognised countries, including the United States, are exempt from submitting a separate English certificate.
language_requirements.deadline: [uncertain] The common University language page says English proof is due by 31 August for open-access degree programmes, but the programme-specific apply page does not state a separate deadline.

application_deadline_eu.notes: The third call is only for EU students and non-EU students residing in Italy.

application_deadline_non_eu.call_three: Not applicable for non-EU applicants residing outside Italy.
application_deadline_non_eu.notes: The third call is restricted to EU students and non-EU students residing in Italy.

required_documents.document_name: Bachelor's degree or provisional academic qualification certificate
required_documents.notes: If the final qualification has not yet been awarded, an enrolment or provisional certificate is accepted.
EU citizens and non-EU citizens residing in Italy may use an ID card; other applicants use a passport.
Required only for non-EU citizens residing in Italy.

required_documents.document_name: English language certificate or other accepted proof
required_documents.notes: Required unless the applicant qualifies for an official exemption.

required_documents.document_name: Any additional programme-specific document requested by the selection committee
required_documents.notes: The programme reserves the right to invite applicants to an online interview during the assessment procedure.

required_documents.document_name: Original and legalised previous qualifications with English or Italian translations
required_documents.notes: No legalised documents are required at application stage, but successful applicants must later present original and legalised documents for enrolment.

entry_exam_or_test.test_name: No standard entry test; possible online interview
entry_exam_or_test.applies_to: Only applicants invited by the selection committee during the assessment procedure.
entry_exam_or_test.dates: No fixed interview schedule is published; interviews are arranged only if requested by the committee.
entry_exam_or_test.scoring_or_threshold: No written test or published score threshold is stated; the committee reserves the right to invite applicants to an online interview.

source_quotes.quote: invite applicants to take an online interview

uncertainty_notes: No standalone 2026/27 programme-specific admission PDF was found for this course; the official apply.unipd.it course page and common University admissions pages were used.
The programme-specific apply page states the B2 English requirement but does not publish a separate English-proof deadline; the common University language page was used for the deadline rule.
